  4. Christian Didier Chin
CD

Christian Didier Chin

Davis Cup regular and former top Malaysian junior.

Profile

Full nameChristian Didier Chin
NationalityMalaysia (of Malaysian-Taiwanese parentage)
CategoryATP / ITF World Tennis Tour · Davis Cup
Born23 August 2000, Sabah, Malaysia
PlaysRight-handed (two-handed backhand)
Current rankingNot currently listed inside the main ATP rankings
Highest rankingATP singles No. 1440 (Sep 2019); doubles No. 1130 (Nov 2019)
Main eventsDavis Cup (Malaysia), ITF World Tennis Tour, SEA Games

Recent results

Best known for his junior and Davis Cup career; recent professional match activity in public records is limited.

Career highlights

  • Career-high ATP singles No. 1440 and doubles No. 1130 (2019)
  • ITF junior combined ranking high of No. 44 (2018)
  • Reached the Australian Open junior boys' second round (2018)
  • Davis Cup record of 8–7 for Malaysia
  • Product of the National Tennis Academy, Kuala Lumpur

Playing style

Right-handed with a two-handed backhand.

Sources

  • ATP Tour profile
  • ITF profile
  • Wikipedia

Compiled from public sources. Where a detail is not publicly available it is marked as such rather than estimated. Spot an error? Let us know.
